model: Mobi Garden KAWA UL EXO-FLEX™ BACKPACKING TENT
modelEn: Mobi Garden KAWA UL EXO-FLEX™ BACKPACKING TENT
description: 2 lb 13 oz (1.27 kg) minimum weight — lightest tent in the EXO-FLEX™ series. ExoSpeedFlex deploys the outer shell first; dual Y-poles at head and foot raise interior headroom at the entry point and shoulder zone, trading wind ceiling for habitable volume. 20D Ripstop Nylon throughout, 36 mph (16 m/s) wind-tested. Three-season, 2P.
highlights: 2 lb 13 oz (1.27 kg) minimum weight — lightest tent in the EXO-FLEX™ series. Three-season, 2P.

model: Mobi Garden KONGAR UL EXO-FLEX™ BACKPACKING TENT
modelEn: Mobi Garden KONGAR UL EXO-FLEX™ BACKPACKING TENT
description: Built for multi-day Hengduan backpacking — Force 8 conditions, exposed ridgeline, no flat ground. ExoSpeedFlex deploys the outer shell first; the inner tent never contacts rain during the 60-second three-step pitch. 20D Ripstop Nylon throughout, 3,000mm HH fly and 4,000mm HH floor. FFP™ FeatherFlex Poles. 3 lb 3 oz (1.45 kg) minimum weight, 2P.
highlights: Built for multi-day Hengduan backpacking — Force 8 conditions, exposed ridgeline, no flat ground. model: Mobi Garden KORA UL EXO-FLEX™ BACKPACKING TENT
modelEn: Mobi Garden KORA UL EXO-FLEX™ BACKPACKING TENT
description: ForeBow™ asymmetric front pole raises entry height and extends vestibule volume on the single-door side — built for long traverses where pack-on entry and covered cook space matter more than symmetric geometry. ExoSpeedFlex deploys the outer shell first; inner tent stays shielded throughout the 60-second pitch. 20D Ripstop Nylon throughout, FFP™ FeatherFlex Poles, Force 8 validated. 3 lb 3 oz (1.45 kg) minimum weight.

model: Mobi Garden LUNTA PRO BACKPACKING TENT - Alpenglow / Cloud - 2 Person
modelEn: Mobi Garden LUNTA PRO BACKPACKING TENT - Alpenglow / Cloud - 2 Person
description: CompWeave™ 30D nylon-polyester composite fly — higher abrasion resistance than equivalent-weight pure nylon, 2,000mm HH waterproofness. X-pole freestanding architecture pitches inner-first on any surface without terrain dependency. Available in 2P and 3P with the same pole geometry and pitch sequence. 30D Ripstop Nylon floor, 3,000mm HH. From 3 lb 11 oz (1.67 kg) minimum weight.

model: Mobi Garden Mountain Wing Backpacking Chair
modelEn: Mobi Garden Mountain Wing Backpacking Chair
description: From 1 lb 9 oz (698g), rated to 250 lbs (110 kg). DuroWeave™ 300D polyester construction over a 7001 aluminum alloy 66 Nylon X-HUB frame — up to 600N tear resistance. Fixed-geometry legs pack to 4.3×4.3×14.2 in (11×11×36 cm). Same seating dimensions as Mountain Wing Pro.
highlights: From 1 lb 9 oz (698g), rated to 250 lbs (110 kg). DuroWeave™ 300D polyester construction over a 7001 aluminum alloy 66 Nylon X-HUB frame — up to 600N tear resistance. Fixed-geometry legs pack to 4.3×4.3×14.2 in (11×11×36 cm). Same seating dimensions as Mountain Wing Pro.

model: Mobi Garden Mountain Wing Pro Ultralight Backpacking Chair
modelEn: Mobi Garden Mountain Wing Pro Ultralight Backpacking Chair
description: From 1 lb 7 oz (639g), rated to 300 lbs (140 kg). Dyneema® G-Grid fabric reaches up to 1200N tear resistance over a 7001 aluminum alloy frame with five-axis CNC-machined X-HUB connectors. All-Terrain Leveling System rotates each side's linked leg pair up to 20° for full four-point contact on uneven ground. One integrated FFP™ ground stake stores in the X-HUB cap and anchors to the leg-foot eyelet in wind.
highlights: From 1 lb 7 oz (639g), rated to 300 lbs (140 kg). Dyneema® G-Grid fabric reaches up to 1200N tear resistance over a 7001 aluminum alloy frame with five-axis CNC-machined X-HUB connectors. model: Mobi Garden TALO X-FLEX™ BACKPACKING TENT
modelEn: Mobi Garden TALO X-FLEX™ BACKPACKING TENT
description: X-Speed-Flex integrated sleeve construction pitches inner and outer in two steps — the fly is already in place before the inner tent rises, keeping the sleep surface dry during setup. Asymmetric tarp vestibule extends one side of the fly into covered cook and gear space, supported by trekking poles already on trail. 150D Polyester Ripstop floor, 4,000mm HH. 3 lb 15 oz (1.8 kg) minimum weight, 2P.
highlights: X-Speed-Flex integrated sleeve construction pitches inner and outer in two steps — the fly is already in place before the inner tent rises, keeping the sleep surface dry during setup.
